title: disable lower
text: disable lower Access table and field names when they are in uppercase. USYS$SYB_PARAMS = disable lower Description When this option is set, it is possible to access table and field names when they are in uppercase. The alternative solution is to map the uppercase name to the lowercase name in the assignment file. For example: CUSTOMER.NAME = $SYB:customer.name Copy Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
